selected.title: Claim 2 seed perturbation regression check
selected.decision_if_pass: Keep Claim 2 marked stable under seed variation.
selected.decision_if_fail: Mark Claim 2 as unstable and require expanded seed coverage before promotion.

selected.title: Claim 3 Option-B regression stability check
selected.decision_if_pass: Maintain supported Claim 3 status and continue with current model family assumptions.
selected.decision_if_fail: Downgrade Claim 3 support and prioritize model-robustness follow-up tests.

stop_condition.note: Time remained while only Tier C work was queued. Budget reallocated to Tier A hardening tasks.
